target_mechanism: BUZZ-RES: FFT-based Q-K spectral matching for selective KV release; resonant-frequency-gated attention

results.title: Buzz pollination — Wikipedia
results.rationale: Source-domain biology reference (buzz pollination, anther resonance). Not an LLM/attention mechanism; no functional overlap.

results.title: Massive Values in Self-Attention (2025/2)
results.rationale: Studies Q/K magnitude concentration, not spectral/FFT matching or resonant-frequency gating. Tangential to KV selection but no spectral mechanism.

results.title: FreqFormer Spectral Routing Attention (2026/4)
results.rationale: Frequency-band-routed attention input gate; shares spectral routing concept but routes by frequency band rather than explicit Q-K resonant matching. Func 0.75-0.85 calibration → 0.8; sem crosses 0.7 threshold.

results.title: Convection-Inspired Sparse Routing (2025/9)
results.rationale: Routing by activation magnitude/feature; not spectral, not resonant. Generic sparse routing only.

results.title: Spectral-Band Q-K Matching Attention (2026/3)
results.rationale: FFT-based spectral matching between Q and K for selective attention — near-identical mechanism to BUZZ-RES's query-key spectral matching. Calibration 0.85-0.95 → 0.9. Strong hit on all axes.

results.title: Concentric Arc Sparse Attention
results.rationale: Spiral arc geometric sparse pattern; unrelated to spectral or resonant gating.

results.title: Resonance-Gated Layer Activation in Transformers (2025/11)
results.rationale: Resonance-frequency gated layer activation — shares the resonant-frequency gating mechanism with BUZZ-RES, applied at layer level rather than Q-KV level. Calibration 0.85-0.9 → 0.88.

results.title: Bumblebee-Inspired Resonant Frequency Attention (2026/4)
results.rationale: Buzz-pollination-inspired resonant Q-KV frequency matching for selective release — essentially the same proposal as BUZZ-RES (source-domain inspiration + mechanism). Calibration 0.9-0.95 → 0.93. Direct prior art.

blocking_hits: rank 8 (2604.11505) — direct bumblebee/resonant frequency attention prior art
rank 5 (2603.18750) — FFT-based Q-K spectral matching prior art
notes: Three independent prior works cover the core BUZZ-RES mechanism: (a) the bumblebee/buzz-pollination inspiration with resonant Q-KV frequency matching is already published (2604.11505); (b) FFT-based Q-K spectral matching for selective attention is already published (2603.18750); (c) resonance-frequency gating in transformers is already published (2511.12203). The proposal lies fully within established spectral/resonant attention territory.
